# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - name: my-vpc-network
    type: compute.v1.network
    properties:
      autoCreateSubnetworks: true
      routingConfig:
        routingMode: REGIONAL

  - name: my-firewall-rule
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.my-vpc-network.selfLink)
      direction: INGRESS
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports: 
            - '22'  # SSH
            - '80'  # HTTP
            - '443' # HTTPS
      sourceRanges:
        - '0.0.0.0/0'  # Adjust as necessary for security
      targetTags:
        - web-server

  - name: my-private-firewall-rule
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.my-vpc-network.selfLink)
      direction: INGRESS
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports: 
            - '3306'  # MySQL
            - '5432'  # PostgreSQL
      sourceRanges:
        - '10.0.0.0/8'  # Restrict to internal IPs
      targetTags:
        - db-server

  - name: my-ssh-firewall-rule
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.my-vpc-network.selfLink)
      direction: INGRESS
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports: 
            - '22'  # SSH
      sourceRanges:
        - 'YOUR_IP_ADDRESS/32'  # Replace with your IP for secure access
      targetTags:
        - ssh-access

outputs:
  vpcNetworkSelfLink:
    value: $(ref.my-vpc-network.selfLink)
